title: Unveiling the Secrets: Inside the WhatsApp Chats of a Minister ransomware incident

victim.name: Unveiling the Secrets: Inside the WhatsApp Chats of a Minister

extortion.description: Unveiling the Secrets: Inside the WhatsApp Chats of a Minister As we pledged, we are now publishing the entirety of former Minister Ayelet Shaked’s WhatsApp conversations. This is not merely a matter of transparency, it is a demonstration of our deep and far-reaching access to the highest levels of authority. Our sources and intelligence capabilities…
